snippet.title: Verappa Extended - Lyric Video | Suriya's Karuppu | RJ Balaji |  @SaiAbhyankkar  | Dream Warrior
snippet.description:
Presenting the Lyrical Video song of "Verappa" from the Tamil movie "Karuppu". Written & Directed by RJ Balaji Starring Suriya, Trisha, Indrans, Natty, Mansoor Ali Khan, Swasika, Sshivadha, Anagha Maya Ravi, Supreeth Reddy and Others

Song Credits:

Music Composed, Sung and Produced by @SaiAbhyankkar , Arivu
Lyrics : Arun Srinivasan
Additional Vocals : Mahesh Vinayakram, Arun Kaundinya, Yogi Sekar
Rap : Theo 
Synth , Keys and Synth Bass : @SaiAbhyankkar 
Additional Rhythm : Kalyan
Kumbaaara Rhythm : Yanka Percussion Group
Guitars - Godfray Immanuel 
Moorsing : Mahesh Vinayakram
Navtar : Vishnu 

The Indian choral Ensemble:

Vanathi Suresh
Sivaranjini Chandramouli
Shri Badhra K A
Yazhini
Bavathayini Nagarajan
Varsha R Mallya

All Recorded and Produced at Yolo Rechords, Chennai
Sound Engineer : Rajesh Kannan
Creative Consultant : Adesh Krishna

Mixed by @SaiAbhyankkar  at YOLO records 
Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh

Movie Credits :

Cast : Suriya, Trisha, Indrans, Natty, Mansoor Ali Khan, Swasika, Sshivadha, Anagha Maya Ravi, Supreeth Reddy and Others
Written & Directed by RJ Balaji
Produced by Dream Warrior Pictures

Executive Producer : Aravendraj Baskaran
Writers : Ashwin Ravichandran - Rahul Raj - T S Gopi Krishnan - Karan Aravind Kumar
Director of Photography : G K Vishnu
Music :  @SaiAbhyankkar  
Production Designer : Arun Venjaramoodu
Editor : R Kalaivanan
Stunts : Vikram Mor
Production Controller: Rajendran PS
Choreography : Shobi - Sandy - Anusha Viswanathan
Lyrics : Pa Vijay - Vivek - Vishnu Edavan - Asal Kolaar - Adesh Krishna - Arun Srinivasan
Stylist: Praveen Raja - Eka Lakhani - Divya Nagarajan
Costumes : Perumal Selvam
Make-up : Vinoth Sukumaran
Color by Redchillies.color
Sr.Colortist : Ken Metzker
VFX Supervisor : Logaraj.C
VFX studios: Little hippo Studios, Spectre post, halohues studios, EFX magic, Realworks Studios, Sozo VFX, Focus VFX, Bhishma studios, Pix rocks VFX, ADFX Studio(Title animation).
SFX : Arun S Mani (Oli Sound Labs)
Sound Mix - Vinay Sridhar

snippet.title: System - Official Trailer | Sonakshi Sinha, Jyotika, Ashutosh Gowariker | Available In Multi - Audio
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
System Official Trailer 
Starring Sonakshi Sinha, Jyotika, Ashutosh Gowariker
Directed by Ashwiny Iyer Tiwari
Produced by Pammi Baweja, Harman Baweja, Smitha Baliga
Written by Harman Baweja, Arun Sukumar, Ashwiny Iyer Tiwari, Tasneem Lokhandwala, Akshat Ghidial

Official Release Date - May 22, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Neha, an ambitious privileged public prosecutor, daughter of renowned lawyer Ravi Rajvansh works tirelessly to prove herself as she has to win 10 cases consecutively to join as a partner in her father‚Äôs firm. Her life is turned upside down when she meets Sarika, a courtroom stenographer who lives in the suburban small clusters of houses sheltering poor in Delhi. In the backdrop of disadvantages, Neha takes on a complex case and stands against her Father against his will to win her 10th case.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages ‚Äď including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal ‚Äď The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video‚Äôs video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures ‚Äď Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

---



Koi mila hi nahi‚Ä¶
tumhare baad
jo dil ko apna sa lage.

Bahut log aaye
zindagi mein‚Ä¶
par tum jaisa
koi mila hi nahi.

‚ÄúKoi Mila Hi Nhi‚ÄĚ
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo ek mohabbat ke baad
phir kisi aur ka ho nahi paaya.

Is gaane mein
yaadein bhi hain,
dard bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai ‚ÄĒ

tere baad
dil kahin laga hi nahi‚Ä¶

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
itna chaha ho
ki uske baad koi aur accha na laga ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

---



Koi mila hi nahi‚Ä¶
tumhare baad
jo dil ko apna sa lage.

Bahut log aaye
zindagi mein‚Ä¶
par tum jaisa
koi mila hi nahi.

ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo ek mohabbat ke baad
phir kisi aur ka ho nahi paaya.

Is gaane mein
yaadein bhi hain,
dard bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai ‚ÄĒ

tere baad
dil kahin laga hi nahi‚Ä¶

kabhi kisi ko
itna chaha ho
ki uske baad koi aur accha na laga ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

snippet.title: Top 10 Most Misleading Trailers that Ruined the Film Experience
snippet.description:
Basic ga oka trailer cinema ni sell cheyyali, kani dominate cheyyakudadhu. Kani mana Tollywood lo teaser/trailer chusi picha hype ekkinchukuni, theater ki vellaka "idhekkadi mass ra mawa" ani thalakaya pakkanapettukunna sandharbhalu chala unnai.

From Pawan Kalyan‚Äôs Komaram Puli to Rajinikanth‚Äôs Kabali, makers manalni marketing tho ela manipulate chesaru? Teaser lo unna aa "Robotic Spider" movie lo ledhu enduku? Saaho why it felt like an oversold dream?

Ee video lo manam "Top 10 Most Misleading Trailers that Ruined the Film Experience" gurinchi detail ga matladukundham. Indulo mee list lo unna movie undha? Ledha? Comment below!
#FilmyGeeks #Tollywood #TeluguCinema #MovieAnalysis #MisleadingTrailers #PawanKalyan #Prabhas #MaheshBabu #Rajinikanth #Saaho #Komaram Puli #Spyder #Kabali #MovieMarketing #teluguyoutube

snippet.title: ŗ§úŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§≤ŗ•čŗ§ó ŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§Ļŗ§¨ŗ•ćŗ§¨ŗ§§ ŗ§ēŗ§Ņŗ§Įŗ§ĺ | Mehboob Ki Mehndi | Lata Mangeshkar Songs | Leena Chandavarkar
snippet.description:
ūüé∂ Welcome to a journey through the golden era of Hindi music, where the melodies of Lata Mangeshkar reigned supreme. Today, we immerse ourselves in the poignant beauty of "Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya" from the movie Mehboob Ki Mehndi. This song, a timeless classic from the 1970s, captures the essence of love, longing, and the bittersweet realities of the human heart. Lata Ji's ethereal voice, combined with the song's heartfelt lyrics, creates an unforgettable experience that resonates with generations. It speaks of love, loss, hope, and despair, all woven together in a tapestry of emotions. 



Credits :

Song: Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya
Album: Mehboob Ki Mehndi
Artist: Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 



Lyrics :

is zamane me, is mohabat ne
kitne dil tode, kitne ghar phunke
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
dil ke badale darde dil liya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

tanhayi milti hai, mahafil nahi milti
rahe mahobat me kabhi manzil nahi milti
dil tut jata hai, nakam hota hai
ulfat ye logo ka yahi anjam hota hai
koi kya jane, kyu ye parawane,
kyu machalate hai, gum me jalate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

sawan me aankho ko, kitana rulati hai
furasat me jab dil ko kisi ki yaad aati hai
ye zindagi yu hi barabad hoti hai
har waqt hotho pe koi fariyad hoti hai
na dawao ka naam chalata hai
na duao se kam chalata hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

mahabub se har gum manasub hota hai
din rat ulfat me tamasha khub hota hai
rato se bhi lambe ye pyar ke kise
aashiq sunate hai zafa ye yaar ke kise
bemurawat hai, bewafa hai wo,
us sitamagar ka apne dilwar ka,
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

If you're moved by this timeless melody, give it a thumbs up! Share your favorite Lata Mangeshkar song in the comments below, and don't forget to subscribe for more golden gems from the world of Hindi music. Let the magic of music live on‚Ä¶

Gaurav Katare is a renowned Indian content creator known for his engaging and insightful videos on a wide range of topics, with a strong emphasis on scientific facts and knowledge. 
With millions of followers and a passion for storytelling, Gaurav masterfully blends history, science, and curiosity to create content that sparks fresh perspectives.

snippet.description:
Dive into the enchanting world of Alka Yagnik and Udit Narayan with 'Zindagi Ban Gaye Ho Tum' from the movie Kasoor, a true gem from the 2000s. This era gifted us with some of the most heart-touching melodies, and this song stands as a testament to their incredible talent. Their voices intertwine to create a symphony of love, capturing the raw emotion and tender feelings that define true romance. Listen to the pure voice of these two legends. 



Credits :

Song: Zindagi Ban Gaye Ho Tum
Album: Kasoor
Artist: Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 



Lyrics :

Woh khushi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum

snippet.title: Reble - Praying Mantis (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
"Praying Mantis" draws from the insect's deceptive posture. Appearing in prayer while quietly waiting to strike - mirroring the track's poised, watchful energy. Calm on the surface but sharply intentional underneath, the song captures Reble moving with confidence as her moment has arrived.

Stream now: https://ffm.to/pm7

Audio Credits
Written, Performed & Composed by: Reble
Produced by: Lifted
Recording Engineer: Aniket Mohanty
Mixed & Mastered by: Akash Shravan

Video Credits
Director: Vimal | https://www.instagram.com/vilssaro/
DOP: Diwakar | https://www.instagram.com/abidiwa/
Asst. DOP: Leander | https://www.instagram.com/leander__daniel/
Editor: Anush Surya Kumar | https://www.instagram.com/christopherchullan/
VFX: Philip Edge 
BTS: Robin | https://www.instagram.com/robinnatelier/
Producer: Knack Entertainment | https://www.instagram.com/knack_entertainment/
Unit Production Manager: Rohit Chouhan
Line Production Unit: Habakordor Syiem, Heimon Kharsyntiew, Medon Mylliemngap, Rico Nengnong
Colourist: Marina Tebechrani | https://www.instagram.com/marina_tebechrani/
Drone Operator: Kyrshan Pathaw & Lebanriford Dohling
Gear Caretaker: Jayanta Das & Kissing Baro
Cast: Alethea Tariang, Amy M Rani, Clareen Khyriem, Dorothea Tariang, Elynne Lyngdoh, Hazel Mukhim, Niharika Debbarma, Susana M Khyriem
Shout Out: Jeepers Family & Maniacs on Big Bikes | https://www.instagram.com/_jeepers_family/ https://www.instagram.com/__m.o.b.b__/
Stylist: Robertson Lyngdoh | https://www.instagram.com/robertson_lyngdoh_/

Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei

Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te

Lyrics:-
Kondsa thara kaam chale, jo saath me poora gaam chale

Shehar ke bacche fan thare, jab muh pe Ram ka naam chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Are poora circle yaaron ka, jisme bhai-bhai hoti hai

Sircode ve bande hai, jinse thari gel ladaai hoti hai
O duniya hori fan bawli, khoob badaai hoya kare

Dushman aape ban jaave, jab jaan chadhaai hoya kare
Are baaj chale, swaraj chale, re feto jinka khaaj chale

Vaidh badya badmasha ka, tu karta gel ilaaj chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Robin Hood si chhavi thari, manne suni saare gaama me

Thare theke se Dabwali me, aur site se Gurgaama me
Aa Panchkula aur Mahendragarh tak, kaam nahi se rukan ka

Dum rakhe se chhora tere, upar khokha fookan ka
Saaj chale, awaaz chale, kaala diggal ka raaj chale

ūüôŹ Welcome to Devotional Diary Music ūüôŹ

Song   :-  Jo Prem Gali Me Aaya Nahi

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri

snippet.title: MUJHE ROK LO - Farhan Khan ft. Sheeba Chadha & Kumud Mishra (Prod.By Moin) Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Mujhe Rok Lo concludes the 'Alif Laila' concept album, which achieved significant success with 6 out of 12 tracks reaching the Viral Charts. The narrative features renowned Bollywood actors Kumud Mishra and Sheeba Chadda as older versions of 'Alif and Laila' reuniting after decades, exploring themes of love and longing through a mature lens.

Stream the audio on your favorite platform:

Spotify: https://farhankhan.bfan.link/mujhe-rok-lo/spotify
Apple Music: https://farhankhan.bfan.link/mujhe-rok-lo/appleMusic
JioSaavn: https://farhankhan.bfan.link/mujhe-rok-lo/jiosaavn
Gaana: https://farhankhan.bfan.link/mujhe-rok-lo/gaana
Amazon Music: https://farhankhan.bfan.link/mujhe-rok-lo/amazonMusic
YouTube Music: https://farhankhan.bfan.link/mujhe-rok-lo/youtubeMusic

Audio Credits:
Written, Composed & Performed by Farhan Khan
Music: Moin
Additional Music Production: Rakshat Jain
Guitars and Strokes: Jay Rathod
Bass : Shashi Bhushan
Tabla : Pulkeet Kakkad
Sarangi: Ruzan Kalawant
Recording Engineer: Samir Sharap at Studio Input-one
Mixed and Mastered by : Hanish Taneja at Studio Alika

Video Credits:

snippet.title: I Went Fishing Alone And This Happened ūüė® On Vtg!
snippet.description:
#outfishing #horrorgame #horror #fishing #outfishinggame #vtg #vasanthtamilgaming 

Fish, sell, upgrade your gear, and build your camp in this first-person horror fishing game. Explore a haunted forest and uncover clues about a forgotten disappearance near the lake, but return before nightfall, as danger lurks beneath the water.

snippet.title: Mareez - E - Ishq (Lyrics) - Arijit Singh | ZiD | Sharib - Toshi
snippet.description:
#ArijitSingh #MareezEIshq #Zid

Mareez - E - Ishq (Lyrics) - Arijit Singh | ZiD | Sharib - Toshi

Song Credits:
Song Name - Mareez-E-Ishq
Movie - Zid
Singer - Arijit Singh
Lyrics - Shakeel Azmi
Music Composer - Sharib - Toshi

Lyrics:

Mareez-e-Ishq hoon main, kar de dawaa
Mareez-e-Ishq hoon main, kar de dawaa

O o ho‚Ä¶

Talab hai tu, tu hai nasha
Ghulam hai dil ye tera
Khulke zara jee loon tujhe
Aaja meri saanson mein aa (x2)

Mareez-e-Ishq hoon main, kar de dawa
Haath rakh de tu dil pe zara
O o.. haath rakh de tu dil pe zara

Tujhe mere rab ne milaya
Maine tujhe apna banaya
Ab na bichadna Khudaya (x2)

Mohabbat rooh ki hai laazim riza
Haath rakh de tu dil pe zara
O o.. haath rakh de tu dil pe zara (x2)

O.. o.. ho...

Chaha tujhe maine wafaa se
Maanga tujhe maine duaa se
Paaya tujhe teri adaa se (x2)

Karam hadh se hai zyaada mujhpe tera
Haath rakh de tu dil pe zara
O o.. haath rakh de tu dil pe zara
O o.. haath rakh de tu dil pe zara

#Zid #ArijitSingh #MareezEIshq
